title: GitHub Profile Widget Schema
description: Configuration schema for GitHub profile integration large variant

username.label: GitHub Username
username.description: The GitHub username to display profile for

showStats.label: Show Stats
showStats.description: Toggle displaying follower count, repo count, and stars

personalAccessToken.label: GitHub Personal Access Token
personalAccessToken.description: Optional GitHub PAT for higher rate limits and private data (classic token with public_repo scope)
